---
title: "Figure S7"
author: "Phil Zhou"
date: "2025-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r load_packages}
library(svglite)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(gplots)
library(zoo)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r load_dfs}
#Load in the data
BEAN_FUSE_FL <- read_csv(
  here("data", "0326_LDLR_mastersheet.csv")
)

alphagenome_SA_raw <- read.csv(
  here("data", "splicing_analysis", "AlphaGenome_SA.csv")
)
```

```{r fig_S7A}
alphagenome_SA_raw <- alphagenome_SA_raw %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))

alphagenome_SA <- alphagenome_SA_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Intronic, Exonic, not.in.LDLR.FL),
    names_to = "region_type",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  # drop rows where that region has no score
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  # make nicer labels if you want
  mutate(
    region_type = recode(
      region_type,
      "Intronic"              = "intronic",
      "Exonic"                = "exonic",
      "exonic_not_in_LDLR_FL" = "exonic_not_in_LDLR_FL"
    )
  )

base_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # y-axis title
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),  # x tick labels
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )


# --- First plot (BEAN vs Tabet uptake score)
fig_S7A <- ggplot(
  alphagenome_SA,
  aes(x = Distance.to.exon.start,
      y = score,
      color = region_type)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      intronic = "blue",
      exonic = "green",
      not.in.LDLR.FL = "red"
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic() + labs(
    x = "Distance to exon start",
    y = "AlphaGenome splice effect"
  ) +
  base_theme

#print out figure panel
fig_S7A

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S7"), "FigS7A.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S7A,
  width    = 6,
  height   = 4,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S7B}
splicing_variants_615 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL[BEAN_FUSE_FL$Position %in% c(615), ]$`Variant ID`
splicing_variants_713 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL[BEAN_FUSE_FL$Position %in% c(713), ]$`Variant ID`
splicing_variants_770 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL[BEAN_FUSE_FL$Position %in% c(770), ]$`Variant ID`

# Add cysteine flag
BEAN_FUSE_FL <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  mutate(is_cysteine = `Starting AA` == "C")

# ---- Extract their coordinates from the dataset
splicing_tabet_615 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_615)

splicing_tabet_713 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_713)

splicing_tabet_770 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_770)

# ---- Base plot aesthetic settings
base_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # x-axis title
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),  # y-axis title
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),  # x tick labels
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

label_size <- 5.5

fig_S7B <- ggplot(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`, color = `is_cysteine`)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "black", `FALSE` = "black")) +

  # Blue highlighted points
  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_615,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#181CED"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-0.5, 1.5, by = 0.5)  # force 0, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5
  ) +

  # Labels for those blue highlighted points
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_615,
    aes(
      x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
      y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`,
      label = `Variant ID`
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size,
    color = "#181CED",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  # Blue highlighted points
  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#86ED18"
  ) +

  # Labels for those blue highlighted points
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(
      x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
      y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`,
      label = `Variant ID`
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size,
    color = "#86ED18",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  
  # Blue highlighted points
  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_770,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#ED7F18"
  ) +

  # Labels for those blue highlighted points
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_770,
    aes(
      x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
      y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`,
      label = `Variant ID`
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size,
    color = "#ED7F18",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized score",
    y = "Tabet et al. LDL uptake score"
  ) +
  base_theme

#print out figure panel
fig_S7B

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S7"), "FigS7B.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S7B,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 8,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_S7C}
# Add cysteine flag
BEAN_FUSE_FL <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  mutate(is_cysteine = `Starting AA` == "C")

splicing_tabet_615 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_615)

splicing_tabet_713 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_713)

splicing_tabet_770 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_770)

fig_S7C <- ggplot(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense, color = is_cysteine)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "black", `FALSE` = "black")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-0.5, 1.5, by = 0.5)  # force 0, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_615,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#181CED"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_615,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense, label = `Variant ID`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size, color = "#181CED", fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#86ED18"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense, label = `Variant ID`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size, color = "#86ED18", fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_770,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#ED7F18"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_770,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense, label = `Variant ID`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size, color = "#ED7F18", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "LDLR-FL FUSE score",
    y = "AlphaMissense"
  ) +
  base_theme

#print out figure panel
fig_S7C

#save figure panel
ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S7"), "FigS7C.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S7C,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 8,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r printing_fig}
fig_S7 <- fig_S7A | fig_S7B | fig_S7C

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_S7"), "FigS7.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_S7,
  width    = 21,
  height   = 7,
  units    = "in",
  create.dir = TRUE,
  dpi = 600
)
```
